name: octon
description: Base .octon/ template for all harnesses, including init objective packs.
goal_alignment: Enable reliable agent execution that is deterministic enough to trust, observable enough to debug, and flexible enough to evolve.

contents.agency/manifest.yml: Agency actor discovery and routing metadata
contents.capabilities/governance/policy/deny-by-d: Developer context and deny-by-default policy contract used by bootstrap validation
contents.agency/governance/MEMORY.md: Cross-agent memory retention and privacy contract
contents.agency/runtime/agents/README.md: How to use and create agents
contents.agency/runtime/agents/_scaffold/template: Template for new agent execution contracts
Template for new agent identity contracts
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/README.md: Canonical bootstrap asset bundle used by /init
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/manifest.y: Bootstrap bundle metadata for projection and ingress validation
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/init-proje: Canonical bootstrap implementation consumed by the stable wrapper path
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/BOOT.md: Template for recurring startup checklist compatibility
Template for one-time bootstrap checklist compatibility
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/alignment-: Template for the root alignment-check shim generated by /init
contents.scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/objectives: Common objective packs used by /init to scaffold the workspace objective contract
contents.scaffolding/runtime/_ops/scripts/init-pr: Stable wrapper path that delegates to scaffolding/runtime/bootstrap/init-project.sh
contents.agency/runtime/assistants/README.md: How to use and create assistants
contents.agency/runtime/teams/README.md: How to use and create teams
contents.orchestration/runtime/missions/README.md: How to create and manage missions
